code:
import io
import string

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut a = 0
mut b = 0
mut count = 0
mut cur = 0
mut sign = 1
mut in_num = false
mut i = 0

while i < n
  let byte = match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
  let is_ws = byte == 32 or byte == 9 or byte == 10 or byte == 13
  let is_digit = byte >= 48 and byte <= 57
  if is_digit
    cur = cur * 10 + (byte - 48)
    in_num = true
  else if byte == 45
    sign = -1
    in_num = true
  else if is_ws
    if in_num
      let val = cur * sign
      if count == 0
        a = val
      else
        b = val
      end
      count = count + 1
      cur = 0
      sign = 1
      in_num = false
    end
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if in_num
  let val = cur * sign
  if count == 0
    a = val
  else
    b = val
  end
end

let result = a * a + b * b
println("r=#{result}")
